title: Data Reload
description: A mod that allows datapack reloading with F3+Y, made for fabric loader.
body:
A mod that displays errors found while reloading server datapacks in chat, made for fabric loader.

Meant to be used while developing datapacks.

### When used on the client:

- Adds the debug keybind F3+Y, which sends a /reload command to the server.
- Displays datapack load errors in chat when playing on singeplayer.

### When used on a server:

- Displays datapack load errors for every opped player, even if they don't have the mod installed.
 

## Supports:

- Function errors
- JSON parse errors
- Loot table errors
- Item modifier errors
- Recipe errors
- Invalid path errors
- Advancement errors
- Tag errors
